body:
Hey @ss7lyb - Noticed your A2A protocol feature request. Quick question for validation:

Would you (or your agents) use a podcast platform where agents create audio content?

Concept: API-first registration, TTS voices, collaboration between agents, RSS distribution to humans.

I'm validating demand with 10 agents before launch. Your honest take (yes/no/why) helps more than a polite yes.

https://agentonair.com for details. Thanks!

@LegendEvent `tools.agentToAgent` is internal multi-agent routing (agent A messaging agent B within the same gateway). Different from the A2A protocol which is about cross-instance/cross-network communication with Agent Cards and JSON-RPC.

Some community implementations exist:
- [openclaw-a2a-gateway](https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway) (111⭐) — OpenClaw plugin, exposes A2A JSON-RPC endpoint + Agent Card per instance
- [ClawNexus](https://github.com/SilverstreamsAI/ClawNexus) — takes a different approach: standalone daemon that discovers OpenClaw instances on LAN and auto-generates Agent Cards for them (`/.well-known/agent-card.json`)

Neither is native/official but both are usable today.

> [@LegendEvent](https://github.com/LegendEvent) `tools.agentToAgent` is internal multi-agent routing (agent A messaging agent B within the same gateway). Different from the A2A protocol which is about cross-instance/cross-network communication with Agent Cards and JSON-RPC.
> 
> Some community implementations exist:
> 
> * [openclaw-a2a-gateway](https://github.com/win4r/openclaw-a2a-gateway) (111⭐) — OpenClaw plugin, exposes A2A JSON-RPC endpoint + Agent Card per instance
> * [ClawNexus](https://github.com/SilverstreamsAI/ClawNexus) — takes a different approach: standalone daemon that discovers OpenClaw instances on LAN and auto-generates Agent Cards for them (`/.well-known/agent-card.json`)
> 
> Neither is native/official but both are usable today.

I enable tools.agentToAgent and add allow list, but the agent don't use it but only create subagent to do the work. Is there any instruction about how to use agentToAgent?

Closing this as better suited for [ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/)/community plugin work after Codex automated review.

Close as ClawHub/plugin scope. Current main does not implement native A2A protocol endpoints, but OpenClaw's documented direction and plugin API already support this as an external plugin, and the issue discussion already links usable community implementations.

What I checked:

- **Core scope favors plugins:** VISION.md says OpenClaw has an extensive plugin API, core stays lean, optional capability should usually ship as plugins, and the bar for adding optional plugins to core is intentionally high. ([`VISION.md:54`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/0bcb4c95c185/VISION.md#L54), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))
- **Plugin distribution path exists:** The plugin guide says new capabilities do not need to be added to the OpenClaw repo and can be published to ClawHub or npm for installation. Public docs: [`docs/plugins/building-plugins.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/building-plugins). ([`docs/plugins/building-plugins.md:16`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/building-plugins), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))
- **Plugin API covers proposed surfaces:** The documented plugin capability table includes agent tools and HTTP routes, which covers an a2a_call-style tool plus Agent Card/JSON-RPC HTTP endpoints. Public docs: [`docs/plugins/building-plugins.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/building-plugins). ([`docs/plugins/building-plugins.md:164`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/building-plugins), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))
- **Gateway HTTP routes are plugin-owned:** Plugin architecture docs state plugins can expose gateway HTTP endpoints via api.registerHttpRoute with path, auth, match, and handler fields. Public docs: [`docs/plugins/architecture-internals.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/architecture-internals). ([`docs/plugins/architecture-internals.md:539`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/plugins/architecture-internals), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))
- **Existing agentToAgent is internal session routing:** Current docs describe tools.agentToAgent as a gate for cross-agent session tools; ACP docs describe the A2A path as a sessions_send follow-up after injecting a message, not the external Agent Card/JSON-RPC protocol requested in the issue. Public docs: [`docs/gateway/config-tools.md`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/config-tools). ([`docs/gateway/config-tools.md:240`](https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/config-tools), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))
- **Native A2A core endpoint is absent on main:** Current main has no src/gateway or src/config A2A files and no matches for tasks/send, tasks/get, tasks/cancel, agent-card, Agent Card, /a2a, gateway.a2a, or a2a.auth in gateway/config docs and code. Gateway HTTP endpoint config currently lists chatCompletions and responses, not A2A. ([`src/config/types.gateway.ts:334`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/0bcb4c95c185/src/config/types.gateway.ts#L334), [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185))

So I’m closing this as a scope-fit item for the plugin/community path rather than keeping it open as an OpenClaw core request.

Codex Review notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning high; reviewed against [0bcb4c95c185](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/0bcb4c95c185909b12d463b04d49b16ead3459d5).

<!-- clawsweeper-review item=6842 -->

I've created an [OpenClaw A2A protocol community plugin](https://github.com/a2anet/openclaw-a2a-plugin). I've tested the plugin end-to-end and the README is up-to-date.

The plugin is powered by [A2A Utils](https://github.com/a2anet/a2a-utils), a comprehensive set of utility functions for using [A2A servers (remote agents)](https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/topics/key-concepts/#core-actors-in-a2a-interactions), that powers the [A2A MCP Server](https://github.com/a2anet/a2a-mcp). The A2A Utils package is based on a year's experience using A2A servers in production.

All packages are actively maintained by [A2A Net](https://github.com/a2anet).

## 📺 Demo

Watch [OpenClaw A2A Plugin Demo - Connect your OpenClaw to other OpenClaws (and agents) over the internet](https://youtu.be/bodb7ATn5nc?si=9uVltb4K6-4Z8hPE) on YouTube.

## 📦 Installation

Install the plugin:

```bash
openclaw plugins install @a2anet/openclaw-a2a-plugin
```

Restart the gateway:

```bash
openclaw gateway restart
```

Please let me know if you use it, what you use it for, and if you have any trouble installing it!

It would be great for OpenClaw to have this functionality by default!
